mapper.sql: id, budget_year, category, item_name, amount, expense_date, department, note, writer, created_at, modified_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_ehs_budget_expense (budget_year, category, item_name, amount, expense_date, department, note, writer, created_at, modified_at) VALUES (#{budgetYear}, #{category}, #{itemName}, #{amount}, #{expenseDate}, #{department}, #{note}, #{writer}, GETDATE(), GETDATE())
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_ehs_budget_expense SET budget_year = #{budgetYear}, category = #{category}, item_name = #{itemName}, amount = #{amount}, expense_date = #{expenseDate}, department = #{department}, note = #{note}, writer = #{writer}, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
